'''bamïfchïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okara|okara]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-m-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okara|okara]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| bamïfchïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || bæmïfchïfth || bæmïfchïfj || bæmïfchïfsh || bæmïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || bamïfmïfchïfth || bamïfmïfchïfj || bamïfmïfchïfsh || bamïfmïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || bamïfchïfth || bamïfchïfj || bamïfchïfsh || bamïfchïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || bamïffchïffth || bamïffchïffj || bamïffchïffsh || bamïffchïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || bamïfchïfïf || bamïfchïfïf || bamïfchïfïf || bamïfchïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || bamïfchïfth || bamïfchïfj || bamïfchïfsh || bamïfchïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || bamïfchïfïfl || bamïfchïfïfl || bamïfchïfïfl || bamïfchïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || bamïfchïfïfïf || bamïfchïfïfïf || bamïfchïfïfïf || bamïfchïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || bamïfchïfïfn || bamïfchïfïfn || bamïfchïfïfn || bamïfchïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || bamïfchïfïforo || bamïfchïfïforo || bamïfchïfïforo || bamïfchïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
